originalTitle: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
summary: The Yen and Swiss Franc were stronger against the dollar as investors sought safe havens after Chinese start-up DeepSeek’s new AI model hit U.S. tech stocks.
content: The Yen and Swiss Franc were stronger against the dollar as investors sought safe havens after Chinese start-up DeepSeek’s new AI model hit U.S. tech stocks.
chineseTitle: DeepSeek 新闻提振避风港，瑞士法郎和日元上涨
chineseSummary: 中国初创公司 DeepSeek 的新人工智能模型冲击美国科技股后，投资者寻求避险，日元和瑞士法郎兑美元走强。
chineseContent: 中国初创公司 DeepSeek 的新人工智能模型冲击美国科技股后，投资者寻求避险，日元和瑞士法郎兑美元走强。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
